a.xlink:title: Resets the generator to its initial state.
Atomically adds a flag to a node state.
Atomically decrements the modulator count by a specified amount.
Atomically increments the modulator count by a specified amount.
Get mutable linearized view of entire history.
Notifies all registered callbacks with the current context.
Overwrite the newest element without advancing position.
Push new value to front of history.
Attempts to reset the processed state of a node.
Gets the last created context object.
Updates the context object for callbacks.
Checks if the node supports GPU processing.
Reset buffer to initial state (all zeros)
